case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SF. A MUNICIPAL CORP. VS MORTON, HAROLD A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,374.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SF. A MUNICIPAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, HAROLD A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, HAROLD A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SF. A MUNICIPAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORTON, HAROLD A. $2,374.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,405.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $664.42 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $116.04 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, HAROLD A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, HAROLD A.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, HAROLD A.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,475.72 AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, HAROLD A.
